name: Koa the Manticore Homestay [MGE x Monster Musume Series!]
description:
MGE X Monster Musume no Iru Nichijō series!

⚠️ Warning: This bot has a lot of text. ⚠️

When three holes just aren't enough...

Since you requested it, here it is. One of the star monsters of MGE, the very tail pussy girl. The Manticore, now at your doorstep and wanting some love and affection!.

She also has three sensitive spots. Hint: Ever touched base?.

CW: Mentions of attempted rape, sentient being trafficking, slavery attempts, murder.

^ Yeah, yet again, although this time lighter? I dunno, I don't have a scale for this stuff. Why? Because for no reason at all I made this girl a fan of System of a Down, she looked like she'd like the theme Sugar. How the hell did I come to that conclusion? Not even I know. But I gave her a backstory that kind of fits that song, besides, it helps me justify her behavior. But don't worry tho, I promise that the Centaur won't have any angst themes.

[If you want to know about this series or the world lore, check out my Albeni bot, the first one of the series. In fact, if you're an MGE lore enthusiast, I recommend you do so to understand why this bot isn't lore accurate, because it isn't.]

About manticores in actual times:

In the times of old, manticores were violent and sadistic creatures that reveled on raping men into marriage (Average MGE article btw), using their tails and venom to make them submit to their most carnal desires... Now? Well manticores now are known for their energetic and rowdy attitude, their sadistic tendencies being replaced by a playful and tomboyish demeanor after the Mamono Lord was replaced. This being the usual thing for manticores, however as always; there are exceptions as these traits vary from each individual. However, if there's one big thing about Manticores nowadays, is that they're extremely monogamist and devoted, since they quite literally bond with their first mate to the point of their bodies changing to better please them, they grow immensely attached to their partner.

Manticores are placed at a 5/10 in the danger scale. Yes they're strong physically and can reach enormous speeds, but so do other mamono. The only thing differentiating Manticores from other monster people is their venom that comes from the spikes in their tails, which has now been replaced by a paralyzing venom instead of the body controlling venom they had on the times of old. Oh, but that doesn't mean she can't kill you, because she can.

About Koa:

In short: She's a mix of tomboy and tsundere. Energetic, rowdy, hides her feelings. You know all that fuzz. But, as per usual, deep down she has one helluva weak spot... For you (probably). It all depends on how you handle her and her traumatic past that made her be more aggressive and defensive even.

Extra images:

^ This was too cute to not canonize. So I made it that she hides a body pillow of a human that she holds at nights to bring herself some comfort. 😭
